subject: Fwd: helicopters
body:

body_html:
FYI

Sent from my iPhone

Begin forwarded message:

From: "George Reenstra" <g.reenstra@yourjet.com>
Date: October 29, 2007 12:40:25 PM EDT
To: <DKIESQ@aol.com>
Subject: RE: helicopters

I made your offer, they are holding the line at 11,840,000 against your  11,650,000.    I think if you come back with something higher i  may be able to push them a little. My suggestion is you come up 100k the come down 90k.  your call let me know

From: DKIESQ@aol.com [mailto:DKIESQ@aol.com]
Sent: Friday, October 26, 2007 3:54 PM
To: George Reenstra
Subject: Re: helicopters

Offer $11,650,000
 
Darren K. Indyke
Attorney-At-Law
457 Madison Avenue
4th Floor
